name: Pigs of Fire

abilities.name: Flaming Bacon
abilities.text: When this model receives a raise on an attack action, the target gains a Burning token.

abilities.name: What Doesn't Burn Ya, Grows Ya
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may remove a Burning token from a model within 2". If it does so, this model gains a Glutted token.

keyword_actions.granted_to: Friendly unique Sooey models and Sooey models with the beast characteristic

actions.name: Mad Dash
actions.effects: Move this model up to its Sp +2 in a straight line, ignoring other models. Enemy models moved through this way are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Trailing After
triggers.text: Summon a Piglet with a Burning token in base contact with an enemy model that suffered damage from this action.

extraction_notes: Ability section explicitly states it applies to 'Friendly Sooey models'
Action section explicitly states it applies to 'Friendly unique Sooey models and Sooey models with the beast characteristic'
Mad Dash has a TN icon followed by '2' in the action table
Mad Dash uses Sp (Speed) stat with +2 modifier
Card references Burning and Glutted tokens but does not define them
